title: cenchrus pennisetiformis
intro: Cenchrus pennisetiformis, also known as Pennisetum pedicellatum or Buffalo Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cenchrus pennisetiformis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
